{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161523F3FEF60AE2A365061167"}"},"total":1483},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578454673856430872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看！[注意]名副其实的一本无cp的斩戏同人，以斩神为世界，主角拥有二九加强后的剧院，技能是戏神那边的神道技能，靠抽奖获得，对于自己穿越，对别人说的是可以预测未来，创立黄昏社，以送葬神明为目标，事件过渡自然，刀子不多，文笔好[已种草][书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764498906,"group_id":"7427418329863687192","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0yASjWRPWl/KKxMY6iboDg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d2b325f3d23c4c45b34a6b4422ca0d47~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788740&x-signature=Is7%2Bnr1RMpeBGptF7WwMLz%2FauB0%3D","user_id":"195083842910442","user_name":"云川一夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"195083842910442","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427418329863687192","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+戏神+无女主+跟船流】
为帮某人修复刀子太多的BUG，叶开来到斩神世界，开局和浅羽·牛郎界卧龙·最耀眼的牛郎新星·熟女之友·七夜先生成为了好朋友。
金手指是那个男人亲自改良过的乐高剧院。
不但驯服了嘲灾，还能根据期待值抽取所有戏神世界的技能，吸收神秘反哺自身。
管他什么主神至高，就算是创世，化身嘲灾亦可吞食！
当暗夜终临，我将身穿戏袍，立于废墟之上，血染天穹！
想让我成为克系走狗？问问我体内的猩红之主！
身具十二神道，练就猩红本源。
仅凭一条扭曲的戏神道，便可杀尽海外诸神，威震寰宇！
最终成就诸神愚戏，将克戏神明玩弄于鼓掌之中！
林七夜：不是哥们，你不是说你也是七神代理人吗？这十四条通神大道怎么个事儿！？
“你猜我为什么叫叶开？”
“为什么？”
“因为我开了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c271f039de6d97b8971beca59993adea","author":"甜粽子","author_id":"","book_id":"7427418329863687192","book_name":"别人神墟我神道，敢弄死我就放嘲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7435620110615708185","read_count":"60868","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1577695"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"769","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,二次元,无女主,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4b7e237ee95b0e9081433e37164b276~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437724&x-signature=ZZ4q3%2FZyTgSURII6hj5f%2BdHarlg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3153037192597651","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161523F3FEF60AE2A365061167"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count" 而且笑点很多，不会重申刀子！（好评！）
特别是叶开的“和谁都能磕”体质，粽子写的超级棒！
总之就是，我觉得这本书文笔超好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767003817,"group_id":"7427418329863687192","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"初中生，喜欢看小说。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8XDR+Si+Sm+OSc3vOnPJ/01viG4FOU63ecrbkRYmuM9","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/69613efe549c4da1880d7b805e9c321a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792172&x-signature=ukZZvKi41qzucrXgbQ%2F4bNqzTnc%3D","user_id":"1936663344063707","user_name":"一叶舟ovo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1936663344063707","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427418329863687192","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神+戏神+无女主+跟船流】
